title: Creativity
purpose: Make explicit a capability currently implicit in the framework: perspective shift, constraint play, and prompt remix for AI exploration.
rationale: Creativity is a priority candidate module to make exploration methods teachable and repeatable without over-structuring discovery.
research_questions: How should creativity be integrated as a formal module in the framework?
Which creativity methods best fit AI adoption: design thinking, double diamond, lateral thinking, or lightweight hybrids?
How much structure supports creativity before it becomes restrictive?
